name: CHIPZ
subtitle: Dual VCO and LFO
summary: A 12 HP dual VCO and dual LFO module inspired by the lo-fi character of classic game consoles. Each oscillator offers five morphable waveforms — Chip1 has an integrated filter, Chip2 has voltage-controlled pulse width. The dual LFO outputs two rates simultaneously (LFO2 runs 4× faster than LFO1), designed to pair with the Cellz touchpad sequencer.
